title: SkillZ
body:
This project is a backport of Globox_Z's [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) mod to 1.20.1 as he has stopped maintaining the older mod version and I really needed the customizable skill features. It is almost identical to the 1.21.1 version but has had its features expanded and dependencies replaced. Its new features include: - Redone level screen - Automatic restricting of items and blocks through `Populators` - Book Widgets to show each of the restriction screens - Redone enchantment restrictions, as well as a tooltip. - Config for complete block & hand interactions restriction - Config for the highlight of restricted blocks - New config system that syncs from server - Showing the required skills in the restriction tooltip - Turning off the inventory tab (part of TabAPI) - You can also use your old LevelZ restriction addons (like findict's) as long as its the 1.21.1 version

Modpack Policy Feel free to use this in any modpacks, reach out on discord if you need support or want to request additional features or compatibility.
